capabilities: Integrate access logging with agent reasoning to improve security monitoring and incident response.

procedure.action: Capture access logs and identify key events for analysis using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Validate the integrity and completeness of captured logs by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit error code VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field.

Incorporate agent reasoning to interpret log data contextually using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Define criteria and metrics for evaluating log analysis effectiveness by specifying schema, constraints, and invariants in machine-readable form; include at least one falsifiable acceptance criterion with a numeric threshold (e.g. error_rate < 0.001).

Continuously validate and refine the evaluation procedure based on outcomes using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Establish a robust evaluation framework for access logging by integrating agent reasoning to enhance security insights and operational effectiveness.
title: Access Logging Evaluation with Agent Reasoning

failureConditions: Incomplete log data leads to missed security incidents; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Agent reasoning misinterprets log data, causing false positives.

Ineffective criteria result in poor evaluation of security measures; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
successConditions: Ensure all access events are logged and retrievable; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Verify agent reasoning accuracy against known scenarios; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Evaluate the defined metrics for relevance and effectiveness; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
